rationale: Gov't Code §2306.786 governs administration of a department affordable housing loan program. The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraisals and is unrelated to this housing program administration statute.
quote: In administering the program, the department by rule shall adopt:
_note: No conflict. The cited statute addresses affordable housing program rules; the proposed change targets property tax exemptions under a different code entirely.
